case_title: TAD V. NGUYEN VS. BEAUTIFUL HARDWOOD FLOOR INC.

docket_entries.description: ORDER ON DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL [X]GRANTED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-19-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-19-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF TAD NGUYEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BEAUTIFUL HARDWOOD FLOOR, INC., REPRESENTED BY KIM PHAM AND ANH PHAM, OWNERS. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: SAMUEL LAW; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, TAD V.
(SC-108) REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, TAD V.
(SC-108) ANSWER TO REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BEAUTIFUL HARDWOOD FLOOR INC.
ORDER (SC-108A) ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT: THE REQUEST IS DENIED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY NGUYEN, TAD V. AS TO DEFENDANT BEAUTIFUL HARDWOOD FLOOR INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-19-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, TAD V. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BEAUTIFUL HARDWOOD FLOOR INC. PLAINTIFF'S FINAL PAYMENT TO DEFENDANT SUPPORTS DEFENDANT'S CLAIM THAT THE JOB WAS COMPLETE. FURTHERMORE, PLAINTIFF PRODUCED NO EVIDENCE TO SUBSTANTIATE HIS CLAIM FOR $1,800.00 IN DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT BEAUTIFUL HARDWOOD FLOOR INC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY NGUYEN, TAD V. BEAUTIFUL HARDWOOD FLOOR INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-19-2017 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, TAD V. AS TO DEFENDANT BEAUTIFUL HARDWOOD FLOOR INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-21-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BEAUTIFUL HARDWOOD FLOOR INC.
